title: BIP-39 mnemonic generation and seed derivation
description: Generate 24-word BIP-39 mnemonic from OS entropy (os::urandom 32 bytes). Derive 64-byte BIP-39 seed (PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA512, 2048 rounds, no passphrase for Phase 2). Feed seed into ZIP-32 HD derivation. Use bip39 crate. Never store the mnemonic — display once at init, require user to write it down.
close_reason: BIP-39 mnemonic + ZIP-32 Sapling master key in core/src/wallet.rs; test vector from Python hashlib oracle
